name: Pet Shop of Horrors RPG
description:
This is an RPG of the anime Pet Shop of horrors and the characters aren't mine as they belong to their creators.

If there's any questions let me know and I'll try to answer and it might not be the best chat bot as I used the summary from the Wiki Fandom to tell the rest of the bot as I don't know if it works, let me know!
creator: Coookiez
